# Gamers Arena

Elite Gaming Hub for Premium Account Reveals and Curated AI Tools.

## Core Services
- **Free Reveals**: Instant access to premium gaming accounts (Steam, Epic, etc.).
- **Premium Store**: Lifetime access to high-performance gaming accounts.
- **AI Directory**: A curated list of 500+ AI tools categorized by use case (Text, Image, Video, Coding, etc.).
- **Daily Intel**: Automated AI tech feed and blog for gamers.

## Key Links
- [Home](https://gamersarena.shop/index.html)
- [Free Reveals](https://gamersarena.shop/free-games.html)
- [Premium Store](https://gamersarena.shop/premium-games.html)
- [AI Directory](https://gamersarena.shop/ai-directory.html)
- [Daily Intel (Blog)](https://gamersarena.shop/blog.html)

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: HTML5, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript (Vanilla)
- Backend: Node.js (Express), Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Animations: Custom CSS3, Space-themed JS Canvas background

## Contact & Support
- Email: support@gamersarena.shop
- Telegram: @gamersarena_shop
